title: Sooryavanshi, 15, hits record-breaking 11-ball fifty | Cricket News
description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day internation

blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Sooryavanshi, 15, hits record-breaking 11-ball fifty. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day international squad.
